message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Freizeit, Urlaub und Reisen in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13765","justification":"Survey focuses on leisure, holidays and travel in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1986, directly matching leisure, tourism and transport/travel in the 1980s."},{"title":"Freizeit, Urlaub und Reisen in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13764","justification":"Covers leisure activities, vacations and travel behaviour of residents in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1984; relevant to leisure, tourism and transport in the 1980s."},{"title":"Freizeit, Urlaub und Reisen in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13763","justification":"Examines leisure time, holiday trips and travel patterns in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1982, fitting leisure, tourism and transport topics in the 1980s period (early 80s)."},{"title":"Freizeit, Urlaub und Reisen in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13762","justification":"Study of leisure, holidays and trips for residents of North Rhine-Westphalia in 1980; directly relevant to leisure, tourism and travel in the target region and decade."},{"title":"Konsumklima Nordrhein-Westfalen 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1899","justification":"Consumer climate survey in North Rhine-Westphalia focusing on consumption expectations and behaviour around 1984; relevant to consumption and consumer behaviour in the 1980s."},{"title":"Konsumklima Nordrhein-Westfalen 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1898","justification":"Covers consumer climate and purchasing/consumption assessments in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1982, aligning with consumption and consumer behaviour in the 1980s."},{"title":"Strukturwandel und Lebensqualität in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1893","justification":"Investigates structural change and quality of life in North Rhine-Westphalia including community and urban/rural living conditions during the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Strukturwandel und Lebensqualität in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1892","justification":"Study on structural change and quality of life focusing on community, urban and rural life in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1984, fitting the requested thematic and temporal scope."},{"title":"Freizeitmobilität und Verkehrsmittelwahl in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5000","justification":"Dataset on leisure mobility and choice of means of transport in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1985, directly linking leisure, transport and travel; note that this item’s exact title/DOI should be verified on the GESIS site."},{"title":"Verbraucherverhalten in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1981","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5001","justification":"Study on consumer behaviour in North Rhine-Westphalia around 1981; relevant to consumption and consumer behaviour; note that this item’s exact title/DOI should be verified on the GESIS site."}]}
